message:
Running command: 
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Drain any new pipe content
dd if=/proc/956480/fd/11 bs=4096 count=256 >> /tmp/pipe_extra.log 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Latest pipe content ==="
tail -50 /tmp/pipe_extra.log

echo ""
echo "=== Step 70 dir ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== New steps after 70? ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -10

echo ""
echo "=== Process status ==="
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|VmRSS)" && ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' || echo "OpenROAD EXITED"

echo ""
echo "=== Final? ==="
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "Not yet"
